title: CMA CGM India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: CMA CGM India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the CMA CGM India family as a Warehouse Manager in Vijayawada. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About CMA CGM India:
CMA CGM India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Vendor Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CMA CGM India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
